privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring modifier groups in Floreant POS, an open-source restaurant point-of-sale system. The task defines two modifier groups: PIZZA TOPPINGS with 8 pizza toppings (EXTRA CHEESE $1.50, MUSHROOMS $0.75, PEPPERONI $1.25, ONIONS $0.50, PEPPERS $0.75, OLIVES $0.50, ANCHOVIES $0.75, SAUSAGE $1.25) and BURGER ADD-ONS with 5 burger toppings (AVOCADO $1.50, BACON $1.25, FRIED EGG $1.00, EXTRA PATTY $3.00, JALAPENOS $0.50). The PIZZA TOPPINGS group must be assigned to at least one item in the PIZZA menu category. The Floreant POS Back Office is accessed with PIN 1111, and an ENTER SECRET KEY dialog should be left empty and dismissed with OK.
